landing.heroTitle: Your Trusted Partner for Home Services
landing.heroSubtitle: Connect with verified caregivers, maids, drivers, babysitters, and chefs. Quality care for your loved ones, just a click away.
landing.servicesSubtitle: Professional home services tailored to your needs
landing.packagesSubtitle: Save more with our flexible monthly plans
landing.aboutDescription: Sanad is your trusted platform for connecting families with verified, professional home service providers. We believe everyone deserves quality care and support in their homes.
landing.missionText: To make quality home services accessible, reliable, and stress-free for every family.
landing.contactSubtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

services.caregiversDesc: Professional care for elderly and special needs
services.maidDesc: Professional home cleaning and household support
services.babysittersDesc: Flexible childcare when you need it

profile.profileUpdatedDesc: Your profile has been updated successfully.
profile.passwordChangedDesc: Your password has been changed successfully.
profile.faq1Q: How do I book a service?
profile.faq1A: Browse our services, select a provider, choose your date and time, and confirm your booking. It's that simple!
profile.faq2Q: How do I pay for services?
profile.faq2A: You can pay using your Sanad wallet. Top up your wallet using credit card or Instapay.
profile.faq3A: Yes, you can cancel a booking up to 24 hours before the scheduled time for a full refund.
profile.faq4A: All our providers go through a rigorous verification process including background checks and skill assessments.
profile.callUsDesc: Need immediate assistance? Give us a call.
profile.pointsInfo: Earn 1 point for every 1 EGP spent. Redeem points for discounts on future bookings!
profile.transactionError: Failed to process transaction. Please try again.
